query:
INSERT INTO crm_assets (tagKey, title, assetType, url, thumbnailUrl, description, embedHtml, sortOrder, isActive)
VALUES (
  'video_pemf_3',
  'PEMF — Real Results (Vimeo)',
  'video',
  'https://vimeo.com/1098381990',
  '',
  'PEMF OlyLife product video — real patient results and testimonials. Embed on PEMF pages.',
  '<iframe title="vimeo-player" src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/1098381990?h=72a0b30a8e" width="640" height="360" frameborder="0" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>',
  122,
  1
);
